  "findings": [
    "Condenser/heat pump clearance to wall/other units is below manufacturer's minimum required distance."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate unit to meet manufacturer's minimum clearance requirements.",
    "If relocation is not possible, consult manufacturer for approved alternative installation methods or airflow mitigation accessories."
  ],
  "rationale": "Manufacturer installation instructions specify minimum clearances to ensure adequate airflow and heat rejection. IMC/IRC M1401 requires equipment to be installed per manufacturer's instructions. Observed clearance below the minimum compromises performance, may cause overheating, and constitutes a non-compliant installation.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer installation manual - clearance requirements",
    "IMC 304.1 / IRC M1401.3 - Equipment installation per manufacturer's instructions"
  ]
}
